controlled_stack_count: {ownership_rule_text} How many stacks are controlled by {target_player_name}?
{ownership_rule_text} Count the stacks whose top disk is {target_player_name}.
{ownership_rule_text} What is the number of {target_player_name}-controlled stacks?
{ownership_rule_text} How many visible stacks have a {target_player_name} disk on top?
marked_stack_capture_count: {ownership_rule_text} {capture_rule_text} How many opponent-controlled stacks can the X-marked stack capture now?
{ownership_rule_text} {capture_rule_text} Count the immediate captures for the X-marked stack.
{ownership_rule_text} {capture_rule_text} What is the number of capture jumps available to the X-marked stack?
{ownership_rule_text} {capture_rule_text} How many adjacent opponent-controlled stacks can be jumped by the X-marked stack?
{ownership_rule_text} {capture_rule_text} Count the opponent stacks the X-marked stack can capture in one jump.

code_prompt_defaults.object_description: a tower-draughts-style board with stacks of red and black disks on alternating playable squares
code_prompt_defaults.ownership_rule_text: A stack is controlled by the color of its top disk.
code_prompt_defaults.capture_rule_text: A stack captures by jumping diagonally over an adjacent opponent-controlled stack into the empty playable square immediately beyond it.
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_controlled_stack_count: set "annotation" to bounding boxes [[x0, y0, x1, y1], ...] around every stack controlled by the named color; use an empty array if there are none
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_controlled_stack_count: set "answer" to the number of stacks controlled by the named color
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_marked_stack_capture_cou: set "annotation" to bounding boxes [[x0, y0, x1, y1], ...] around every opponent-controlled stack the X-marked stack can capture; use an empty array if there are none
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_marked_stack_capture_count: set "answer" to the number of immediate captures for the X-marked stack
